distinctive_trait: "Kerberos was depicted as a three-headed dog of giant size with its mane bristling with serpents and its tail ending in a serpent's head."
"A creature of extreme divergence - the fire-breathing chaos-monster of the West and the benevolent water-spirit of the East."
"It is grey in colour, with three claws on each paw and a tail only three fingers long."
"Defined by its three interlocking rows of teeth and its relentless craving for human flesh."
"A once-beautiful woman transformed into a monster whose gaze turns the living to stone, her hair replaced by living serpents. It is the only one Gorgon to be mortal."
"The creature combines a horn, two wings, a single bird's foot, and an eye set at the knee; it bears both male and female genitals."
"Phoenix is known for being immortal - it regenerates from its own ashes or from the father's body depending on the source."
